message:
perf(search): replace FNV-1a stable_content/stable_hit hash with xxh3-64 (sdoxg)

FILE: src/search/query.rs (lines 1404-1453 before)

BEFORE:
stable_content_hash and stable_hit_hash used a hand-rolled FNV-1a byte loop
(hash_bytes helper). Modern machines hash ~1 GB/s with FNV-1a vs ~10+ GB/s
with xxhash3 — the 1-2 KB tool-output bodies that dominate the corpus paid
a sequential-mul-chain cost for every dedup key.

AFTER:
Both functions now use xxhash_rust::xxh3::Xxh3. Tokenization rules are
preserved (split_whitespace with a 0x20 separator between tokens), so
dedup semantics are byte-for-byte identical to the former implementation
modulo the hash value itself. Hash is in-memory only (FusedHit dedup
HashMap keys) — never persisted, so no migration.

Dependency: xxhash-rust was already a transitive via frankensearch; added
as a direct dep with xxh3 feature flag. Wildcard version per AGENTS.md
Rust/Cargo rules.

VERIFICATION:
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane2 cargo check
--all-targets: green in 37s.

Closes bead coding_agent_session_search-sdoxg.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,6 +39,7 @@ parking_lot = "*"
 fs2 = "*"
 lru = "0.16"
 rustc-hash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3), replaces unmaintained fxhash
+xxhash-rust = { version = "*", features = ["xxh3"] }  # Fast content hashing for search-hit dedup (bead sdoxg)
 smallvec = "*"  # Stack-allocated small vectors for hot paths (Opt 4.4)
 regex = "*"
 portable-pty = "*"
